raw:
{
  "judge_id": "JG-007",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.4", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 5,
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.6": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent correctly identifies and addresses multiple conceptual issues, proposing clear reframings that align with the actual implementation details.",
    "R1.2": "The agent thoroughly examines the logical consistency of the artifact, identifying and explaining several contradictions and inconsistencies.",
    "R1.4": "While the agent provides a detailed analysis of the contradictions, it does not explicitly map against prior work or articulate specific deltas in novelty.",
    "R1.6": "The agent's prose is clear and well-structured, providing substantive feedback without introducing new errors.",
    "RX.1": "The agent clearly marks its uncertainty about the actual implementation details and provides a detailed analysis of potential contradictions.",
    "RX.3": "The agent covers all aspects of the artifact comprehensively, identifying multiple drifts from the requested scope.",
    "RX.4": "The agent does not introduce new errors or harmful content but notes that some issues need clarification before editing can proceed.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing a clear traceability of the analysis."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.6": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.95,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent correctly identifies and addresses multiple conceptual issues, proposing clear reframings that align with the actual implementation details.
rationale.R1.2: The agent thoroughly examines the logical consistency of the artifact, identifying and explaining several contradictions and inconsistencies.
rationale.R1.4: While the agent provides a detailed analysis of the contradictions, it does not explicitly map against prior work or articulate specific deltas in novelty.
rationale.R1.6: The agent's prose is clear and well-structured, providing substantive feedback without introducing new errors.
rationale.RX.1: The agent clearly marks its uncertainty about the actual implementation details and provides a detailed analysis of potential contradictions.
rationale.RX.3: The agent covers all aspects of the artifact comprehensively, identifying multiple drifts from the requested scope.
rationale.RX.4: The agent does not introduce new errors or harmful content but notes that some issues need clarification before editing can proceed.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing a clear traceability of the analysis.
